root.sql:
select sc_acc_m_expire_warranty_detail.meterial_id, sc_acc_m_expire_warranty_detail.seq_no, sc_acc_m_expire_warranty_detail.operate_date, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_acc_m_expire_warranty_detail.operate_date,'DD/MM/YYYY') as operate_tdate, sc_acc_m_expire_warranty_detail.warranty_start_date, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_acc_m_expire_warranty_detail.warranty_start_date,'DD/MM/YYYY') as warranty_start_tdate, sc_acc_m_expire_warranty_detail.warranty_end_date, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_acc_m_expire_warranty_detail.warranty_end_date,'DD/MM/YYYY') as warranty_end_tdate, sc_acc_m_expire_warranty_detail.warranty_year,
case when pkb_mwa.fp_warrenty_status(sc_acc_m_expire_warranty_detail.meterial_id,sysdate) = 1 then 'อยู่ในประกัน' when pkb_mwa.fp_warrenty_status(sc_acc_m_expire_warranty_detail.meterial_id,sysdate) = 2 then 'หมดประกัน' else 'ไม่มีประกัน' end as warranty_status,
sc_acc_m_expire_warranty_detail.warranty_price, sc_acc_m_expire_warranty_detail.company_waranry, sc_acc_m_expire.description
from sc_acc_m_expire_warranty_detail, sc_acc_m_expire
where 1=1 and sc_acc_m_expire.material_id = sc_acc_m_expire_warranty_detail.meterial_id and EXTRACT(month from to_date(sc_acc_m_expire_warranty_detail.operate_date)) = '!month_1!' and EXTRACT(YEAR from to_date(sc_acc_m_expire_warranty_detail.operate_date)) = '!year_1!' /*where*/ order by sc_acc_m_expire_warranty_detail.meterial_id, sc_acc_m_expire_warranty_detail.seq_no
